title: tsn-gen stack definition
description: A stack YAML lists protocol layers bottom-up for the logic-driven codec (packet_gen --stack-file). Enforced by `packet_gen --validate --stack-file`.

layers.description: Layers in wire order, lowest first.

service.description: Service name of the layer; must exist in the parsed corpus.

entity.description: Entity within the service (selects which interfaces are available).

interface.description: Explicit interface; when omitted the runtime picks the entity's first interface in key order.

bypass-logic.description: Force PassthroughLogic on this layer (fuzzing escape hatch).
